metadata.name: Trailhead Starter Catalog
metadata.route_note: Route paths and elevation profiles are simplified display traces for TRMNL rendering, not navigation data.
metadata.data_note: Starter records are curated from public route knowledge and should be verified against current land-manager maps, closures, permits, and local conditions before publication.

trails.name: Broken Arrow

season.label: Year-round
season.note: Best outside summer heat and after checking red-rock rain conditions.

trails.highlight: Short red-rock classic with slickrock rolls, ledges, and big Sedona views.

obstacle.name: Devil's Staircase
obstacle.blurb: A stepped slickrock descent and climb that gives the route its signature moment.

trails.name: Backway to Crown King

season.label: Sep-Jun
season.note: Avoid peak desert heat; winter storms can affect the upper mountain.

trails.highlight: A desert-to-pines climb with ledgy washes, old mining remnants, and a town finish.

obstacle.name: The Chute
obstacle.blurb: A steep rock slot that tests tire placement before the final mountain push.

trails.name: Montana Mountain

season.label: Oct-May
season.note: Cool-season route; verify washouts after monsoon storms.

trails.highlight: A long Sonoran loop climbing into oak country above Queen Valley.

obstacle.name: Shelf Road Climb
obstacle.blurb: Narrow shelf turns with loose rock and a wide desert view below.

trails.name: Charouleau Gap

season.label: Oct-May
season.note: Best in cooler months; check recent storm damage before committing.

trails.highlight: A rugged desert mountain crossing with boulder gardens and Tucson basin views.

obstacle.name: The Step
obstacle.blurb: A blunt rock ledge where approach angle and spotter communication matter.

trails.name: Schnebly Hill Road

season.label: Mar-Nov
season.note: Can close or become rough after storms and winter weather.

trails.highlight: A rough climb from red cliffs to pine forest with constant overlook stops.

obstacle.name: Vista Switchbacks
obstacle.blurb: Tight, rocky turns that trade speed for one of Sedona's best horizon lines.

trails.name: Rubicon Trail

season.label: Jun-Oct
season.note: Snow, fire restrictions, and event closures can change access quickly.

trails.highlight: A benchmark granite trail with slabs, lakes, camping, and relentless rock work.

obstacle.name: Little Sluice
obstacle.blurb: A famous granite boulder section that rewards patience and clean tire placement.

trails.name: Dusy-Ershim

season.label: Jul-Oct
season.note: High-elevation snowpack often dictates the practical opening.

trails.highlight: A remote high-Sierra traverse linking lakes, granite, forest, and slow technical travel.

obstacle.name: Thompson Hill
obstacle.blurb: A sustained rocky climb where momentum and line choice both get a vote.

trails.name: John Bull Trail

season.label: May-Nov
season.note: Snow and forest closures can affect access outside the core season.

trails.highlight: Compact Big Bear rock crawling with boulders, pines, and quick consequences.

obstacle.name: Gatekeeper Boulders
obstacle.blurb: The early boulder garden sets the tone before the trail settles into rock ledges.

trails.name: Fordyce Creek

season.label: Jul-Oct
season.note: Water levels, snow, and hydro operations can affect crossings.

trails.highlight: A serious granite and creek route with winch hills, water crossings, and remote feel.

obstacle.name: Winch Hill 1
obstacle.blurb: A steep granite pull that often decides whether the day stays casual.

trails.name: Mojave Road

season.label: Oct-Apr
season.note: Cooler months are preferred; check preserve road conditions after storms.

trails.highlight: A long desert crossing stitched together by history, dry lakes, springs, and wide sky.

obstacle.name: Afton Canyon Crossing
obstacle.blurb: A water and sand decision point near the route's western end.

trails.name: Black Bear Pass

season.label: Jul-Sep
season.note: Usually snow-limited and commonly one-way above Telluride.

trails.highlight: A high alpine pass dropping into Telluride on iconic steps and switchbacks.

obstacle.name: The Steps
obstacle.blurb: Steep rock shelves at altitude with exposure and little room for sloppy inputs.

trails.name: Imogene Pass

season.label: Jul-Sep
season.note: High pass access depends on snowpack and San Juan storms.

trails.highlight: An airy mining-road traverse over one of Colorado's highest drivable passes.

obstacle.name: Tomboy Ledges
obstacle.blurb: Narrow shelf sections above Telluride that make the descent feel cinematic.

trails.name: Engineer Pass

season.label: Jul-Sep
season.note: Check Alpine Loop conditions and lingering snow drifts.

trails.highlight: A classic San Juan route with mines, tundra, big views, and linked pass options.

obstacle.name: Mineral Creek Shelf
obstacle.blurb: Rocky shelf-road climbing that makes the lower approach memorable.

trails.name: Holy Cross City

season.label: Jun-Oct
season.note: High-elevation snow and runoff can shorten the season.

trails.highlight: A short, hard climb toward a ghost town with rocks stacked the whole way.

obstacle.name: Cleveland Rock
obstacle.blurb: A marquee optional climb where even built rigs stop to study lines.

trails.name: Schofield Pass

season.label: Jul-Sep
season.note: Narrow shelf sections and weather make current conditions essential.

trails.highlight: A dramatic mountain connector with waterfalls, shelf road, and serious exposure.

obstacle.name: Devil's Punchbowl Shelf
obstacle.blurb: A narrow exposed shelf near the punchbowl that deserves full attention.

trails.name: Hell's Revenge

season.label: Mar-Nov
season.note: Best spring and fall; summer heat can be severe.

trails.highlight: Slickrock fins, sandstone bowls, optional challenges, and La Sal views.

obstacle.name: Hell's Gate
obstacle.blurb: A steep optional V-notch climb that makes the whole route feel like an arena.

trails.name: Fins and Things

season.label: Mar-Nov
season.note: Best outside summer heat; Sand Flats fees and closures may apply.

trails.highlight: Rolling slickrock fins make a playful rhythm of climb, crest, and drop.

obstacle.name: Slickrock Fin Climb
obstacle.blurb: A tall sandstone fin that looks steeper from the driver's seat than from outside.

trails.name: Moab Rim

season.label: Mar-Nov
season.note: Avoid high heat and check traction after precipitation.

trails.highlight: A steep climb above town that cashes out in Colorado River views.

obstacle.name: Z-Turn
obstacle.blurb: An early off-camber rock turn that announces the route before the rim views arrive.

trails.name: White Rim Road

season.label: Mar-Nov
season.note: Permit-managed route; mud, heat, and flash flooding are major constraints.

trails.highlight: A long canyon circuit with benches, towers, river overlooks, and huge quiet.

obstacle.name: Murphy Hogback
obstacle.blurb: A steep loose climb to a high bench that breaks up the desert rhythm.

trails.name: Elephant Hill

season.label: Mar-Nov
season.note: Permit and park road conditions matter; summer heat is intense.

trails.highlight: A compact Needles classic with sandstone ledges, tight turns, and wild shapes.

obstacle.name: Elephant Hill Switchbacks
obstacle.blurb: Tight stacked switchbacks that make the entry feel like a puzzle box.
